title: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 (12, eps 14-25) + S3 (12, eps 26-37) + S4 (22, eps 38-59) = 59 total, all adapting Fujino Omori's light novels. The only main-story manga is the Kunieda adaptation (id 85161, 89 ch / 10 vols, Young Gangan), which was discontinued in 2018 partway through the Apollo Familia / War Game arc (LN vol ~1-5) and therefore covers only roughly anime Season 1. Seasons 2-4 (eps 14-59, LN vol 6-14+: Ishtar, Xenos/Knossos, etc.) have no manga counterpart and are not mapped here. S1 arc-to-chapter boundaries are approximate.

mappings.arc: Hestia Familia: the Minotaur & meeting Lili
Apollo Familia & War Game (manga discontinued mid-arc)

movies.title: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?: Arrow of the Orion
movies.note: Anime-original canon side-story film (later novelized by Omori); set after Season 1, before Season 2. Not part of the manga.
